props.name: alignment
props.description: Align the modal in the center or top of the screen.

props.name: backdrop
props.description: Apply a backdrop on body while modal is open.

props.name: container
props.description: Appends the vue popover to a specific element. You can pass an HTML element or function that returns a single element. By default `document.body`.

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the modal content component.

props.name: focus
props.description: Puts the focus on the modal when shown.

props.name: fullscreen
props.description: Set modal to covers the entire user viewport

props.name: keyboard
props.description: Closes the modal when escape key is pressed.

props.name: scrollable
props.description: Create a scrollable modal that allows scrolling the modal body.

props.name: size
props.description: Size the component small, large, or extra large.

props.name: transition
props.description: Remove animation to create modal that simply appear rather than fade in to view.

props.name: unmountOnClose
props.description: By default the component is unmounted after close animation, if you want to keep the component mounted set this property to false.

props.name: visible
props.description: Toggle the visibility of alert component.

events.name: close
events.description: Callback fired when the component requests to be closed.

events.name: close-prevented
events.description: Callback fired when the component requests to be closed.

events.name: show
events.description: Callback fired when the modal is shown, its backdrop is static and a click outside the modal or an escape key press is performed with the keyboard option set to false.
